description: Michael McGee and Philip Taffet from the Firedancer team discuss the performance of the Franken Dancer on Solana, highlighting its ability to handle transactions efficiently without drops during high-stress events like the Trump token launch [t=60:42]. They explain architectural improvements made to enhance transaction processing speed and scalability [t=142:6].
topic_summary: The presentation covers the performance of the Firedancer system, showcasing its speed and reliability in processing transactions on the Solana network, particularly during peak loads [t=60:42].
